history.en: Developed in France by crossing English Foxhounds and Harriers with various French scenthound breeds like the Poitevin and Porcelaine to create efficient pack hounds suited for 'petite vénerie' - the hunting of small game
history.zh: 在法国通过将英国猎狐犬和哈里犬与各种法国嗅觉猎犬（如波伊特万犬和瓷器犬）杂交培育而成，以创造适合‘小猎’（小型猎物狩猎）的高效群猎犬。

overview.en: The Anglo-Français de Petite Vénerie is a medium-sized hound bred for stamina, intelligence, and a strong work ethic. This breed is exceptionally alert, loyal, and devoted to its pack—whether canine or human. Their personality balances an energetic, driven hunting instinct with an affectionate, gentle demeanor at home. They are highly social and thrive on companionship, often forming deep bonds with their family. While they can be reserved with strangers, they are never aggressive. Their keen nose and determination make them excellent scent hounds, but these traits also mean they require plenty of mental stimulation. Overall, they are a cheerful, robust breed that excels in an active, structured environment.
overview.zh: 英法小猎犬是一种中型猎犬，以其耐力、智慧和强烈的工作热情而闻名。该品种异常警觉、忠诚，对同伴——无论是犬类还是人类——都极为忠诚。它们的性格平衡了充满活力、驱动性强的狩猎本能与家庭中的温柔、亲切态度。它们非常社会化，喜欢陪伴，常与家人建立深厚感情。虽然对陌生人可能有所保留，但从不具有攻击性。它们敏锐的嗅觉和决心使其成为出色的嗅觉猎犬，但这些特性也意味着它们需要大量的精神刺激。总体而言，这是一个开朗、强健的品种，在活跃且结构化的环境中表现出色。

care.en: Daily care for the Anglo-Français de Petite Vénerie centers on vigorous exercise—at least 60 to 90 minutes of running, hiking, or structured play. Their short, dense coat requires only weekly brushing to control shedding, plus occasional baths. Regular ear checks are crucial due to floppy ears that can trap moisture and debris; clean them weekly. Nail trimming every 3–4 weeks and dental hygiene (brushing 2–3 times per week) complete the routine. Veterinary visits should include annual check-ups, vaccinations, and parasite prevention. Because they are prone to hip dysplasia and ear infections, proactive monitoring is essential. This breed thrives with a consistent schedule and ample outdoor time.
care.zh: 英法小猎犬的日常护理核心是剧烈运动——每天至少60到90分钟的跑步、远足或结构化游戏。它们短而密的被毛只需每周梳理一次以控制脱毛，并偶尔洗澡。由于垂耳容易积聚水分和杂物，定期检查耳朵至关重要，建议每周清洁一次。每3–4周修剪指甲，每周刷牙2–3次以保持口腔卫生。兽医访问应包括年度体检、疫苗接种和寄生虫预防。由于易患髋关节发育不良和耳部感染，主动监测非常重要。该品种在固定的日程和充足的户外活动中表现最佳。

training.en: Training the Anglo-Français de Petite Vénerie requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. As a pack-oriented hound, they respond best to calm, authoritative leadership rather than harsh corrections. Early socialization is vital to prevent shyness or over-alertness. Use reward-based methods with high-value treats and praise, as they can be independent-minded. Scent games and tracking exercises channel their natural abilities and keep them engaged. Keep sessions short (10–15 minutes) to maintain focus. Avoid repetitive drills—variety and challenge prevent boredom. Recall training is critical, as their hunting drive may override commands; practice in safe, enclosed areas first. A well-trained Anglo-Français is a reliable, joyful partner.
training.zh: 训练英法小猎犬需要耐心、一致性和积极强化。作为以群体为导向的猎犬，它们对冷静、权威的领导反应最佳，而非严厉的纠正。早期社会化对于防止害羞或过度警觉至关重要。使用基于奖励的方法，配合高价值的零食和表扬，因为它们可能具有独立思维。气味游戏和追踪训练能够发挥其自然能力并保持其投入。每次训练应保持简短（10–15分钟），以维持注意力。避免重复练习——多样性和挑战能防止无聊。召回训练至关重要，因为它们的狩猎本能可能压倒指令；先在安全的封闭区域练习。一只训练有素的英法小猎犬是可靠而快乐的伙伴。

diet.en: Feed the Anglo-Français de Petite Vénerie a high-quality diet formulated for active, medium-sized breeds. Adult dogs typically require 2–3 cups of dry kibble daily, divided into two meals, adjusted for activity level and metabolism. Protein should be the primary ingredient (25–30%), with healthy fats for energy and joint support. Avoid overfeeding, as this breed can gain weight if under-exercised. Include omega-3 fatty acids (from fish oil or flaxseed) to support coat and joint health. Puppies need three to four smaller meals per day until six months, then transition to two meals. Always provide fresh water. Treats should be limited to 10% of daily calories. Consult your vet for specific needs, especially if hunting or competing.
diet.zh: 为英法小猎犬提供专为活跃中型犬设计的高质量饮食。成年犬通常每天需要2–3杯干粮，分两餐喂食，并根据活动水平和新陈代谢调整。蛋白质应作为主要成分（25–30%），并含有健康脂肪以提供能量和关节支持。避免过量喂食，因为该品种在运动不足时容易发胖。添加欧米伽-3脂肪酸（来自鱼油或亚麻籽）以支持被毛和关节健康。幼犬在六个月前每天需喂三到四顿小餐，之后过渡到两餐。始终保持新鲜饮水。零食应限制在每日热量的10%以内。如用于狩猎或比赛，请咨询兽医以获得具体建议。

livingTips.en: The Anglo-Français de Petite Vénerie is not well-suited for apartment living due to its high energy and need for space. A home with a securely fenced yard is ideal, but they should never be left alone outdoors for long periods—they need human companionship. They can adapt to suburban or rural settings where daily off-leash exercise is possible. With proper socialization, they get along well with children and other dogs, especially if raised together. However, their strong prey drive may make them unreliable with small pets like cats or rabbits. They are generally quiet indoors but may bark when bored. Early training helps them settle. This breed is best for active families or individuals committed to an outdoor lifestyle.
livingTips.zh: 英法小猎犬由于精力旺盛且需要空间，不适合公寓生活。拥有安全围栏庭院的家庭最为理想，但不应长时间单独留在户外——它们需要人类陪伴。它们能适应郊区或乡村环境，在这些地方可以进行每日无绳运动。通过适当的社会化，它们能与儿童和其他犬类友好相处，尤其是一起长大的情况下。然而，它们强烈的猎物本能可能使其与猫或兔子等小型宠物相处不可靠。它们在室内通常安静，但无聊时可能会吠叫。早期训练有助于它们安定下来。该品种最适合活跃的家庭或致力于户外生活方式的个人。
